author: Kenji Watanabe
subject: feat(picking): add vision-guided pick confirmation (NYANKO-456)
body:
Adds a secondary vision check after each grasp attempt to confirm successful pick before conveyor handoff. Reduces drop rate by ~18%.

NYANKO-456

author: Sara Chen
subject: feat(api)!: rename /api/v1/robot-status to /api/v2/status (NYANKO-789)
body:
BREAKING CHANGE: /api/v1/robot-status is removed. Clients must migrate to /api/v2/status.
See docs/api/v2-migration.md.

NYANKO-789

author: Tomás Rivera
subject: fix(palletizing): resolve stack overflow on dense layer calculations (NYANKO-234)
body:
Dense configs with >8 SKU types triggered recursive depth overflow in layer solver. Fixed with iterative DFS.

NYANKO-234

author: Kenji Watanabe
subject: perf(planner): reduce motion planning latency by 40% (NYANKO-567)
body:
Replaces full-graph RRT solver with cached roadmap for repeated task sequences. Average planning time: 120ms → 72ms.

NYANKO-567

author: Yuki Tanaka
subject: fix(auth): patch token refresh race condition (NYANKO-890)
body:
Concurrent requests during token expiry triggered duplicate refresh calls, causing 401 loops. Fixed with per-client refresh lock.

NYANKO-890

author: Sara Chen
subject: chore(ci): upgrade GitHub Actions runners to ubuntu-22.04

author: Tomás Rivera
subject: feat(monitoring): add real-time joint temperature alerts (NYANKO-345)
body:
Streams joint temperature telemetry from NyankoController and raises alerts when any joint exceeds 75°C for >5s.

NYANKO-345

author: Yuki Tanaka
subject: docs(api): update REST API reference for v2 status endpoint

author: Kenji Watanabe
subject: fix(vision): improve depth sensor calibration in low-light conditions (NYANKO-123)
body:
Depth sensors calibrated in bright conditions failed in dim warehouse aisles. Added ambient-light compensation step.

NYANKO-123

author: Sara Chen
subject: feat(integration): add SAP Extended Warehouse Management connector (NYANKO-678)
body:
New out-of-the-box connector for SAP EWM. Enables bidirectional task sync between NyankoOS and SAP WM without custom middleware.

NYANKO-678

author: Tomás Rivera
subject: refactor(core): migrate task scheduler to async event loop
body: Replaces blocking thread-per-task scheduler with asyncio. No user-visible change; enables future concurrency improvements.

author: Yuki Tanaka
subject: build(deps): upgrade OpenCV to 4.9.0
body: Picks up upstream performance fixes for stereo matching and contour detection.

author: Kenji Watanabe
subject: feat(conveyor): dynamic speed adaptation for mixed-SKU lanes (NYANKO-901)
body:
Conveyor speed now adjusts per item based on predicted grasp complexity. Throughput improved 22% in mixed-SKU pilot.

NYANKO-901

author: Sara Chen
subject: fix(gripper): handle suction cup pressure loss during high-speed transfer (NYANKO-112)
body:
Suction loss at speeds >1.2 m/s caused undetected drops. Added mid-transfer pressure checks at 50ms intervals.

NYANKO-112

author: Tomás Rivera
subject: feat(dashboard): add shift-level OEE report with drill-down by robot (NYANKO-502)
body:
Operators can now view OEE broken down by robot arm, shift, and SKU family directly in NyankoOS dashboard.

NYANKO-502

author: Yuki Tanaka
subject: fix(network): resolve TCP keepalive drops on flaky warehouse Wi-Fi (NYANKO-333)
body:
Controllers on 2.4GHz Wi-Fi lost connection after ~8 min idle. Tuned SO_KEEPALIVE intervals and added exponential backoff reconnect.

NYANKO-333

author: Kenji Watanabe
subject: perf(vision): GPU-accelerate bounding box inference pipeline (NYANKO-444)
body:
Migrated bounding box model from CPU to CUDA via TensorRT. Inference time: 85ms → 22ms per frame.

NYANKO-444

author: Sara Chen
subject: feat(sdk)!: remove deprecated RobotClient.connect_v1() method (NYANKO-555)
body:
BREAKING CHANGE: RobotClient.connect_v1() removed after 6-month deprecation window. Use RobotClient.connect() (v2 API).

NYANKO-555

author: Tomás Rivera
subject: fix(planner): prevent deadlock on concurrent multi-arm task handoff (NYANKO-666)
body:
Two-arm systems deadlocked when both arms requested the shared handoff zone simultaneously. Added priority queue with timeout.

NYANKO-666

author: Yuki Tanaka
subject: feat(security): enforce mTLS on all inter-service connections (NYANKO-777)
body:
All controller-to-cloud and controller-to-controller links now require mutual TLS. Certificates managed by built-in PKI.

NYANKO-777

author: Kenji Watanabe
subject: chore(lint): enforce ruff formatting across all Python modules

author: Sara Chen
subject: feat(localization): add Japanese UI locale (ja-JP) (NYANKO-888)
body:
Full Japanese translation for all operator-facing dashboard screens. Supports kanji, hiragana, and katakana input in search.

NYANKO-888

author: Tomás Rivera
subject: fix(telemetry): drop duplicate heartbeat events on reconnect (NYANKO-999)
body:
Controllers emitting buffered events on reconnect sent duplicate heartbeats causing false alert storms.

NYANKO-999

author: Yuki Tanaka
subject: test(integration): add end-to-end pick-and-place regression suite (NYANKO-100)
body:
40 new integration tests covering full pick-and-place cycle under simulated sensor noise.

NYANKO-100
